data.body: E2 (d125) plan PASSED round-6 (0 blocking, 20 advisory) after 5 blocking rounds — all real defects: (1) COH/G6 test-file/module mismatch, (2) G6 isolation bug (cp of linked worktree not isolated -> git clone --local), (3) E2 class-4 mutation underspecified -> mechanical template set, (4) T8 classify_pair matching predicate unspecified -> set-intersection over target_criteria, (5) T8 classify_pair referenced non-existent verdict_dict['findings'] -> fixed to real buckets (blocking/advisory/overflow/indeterminate/dropped). CLAIMED E2 + delegated harness build to subagent (assemble_e2_mutants.py + run_e2_benchmark.py + e2_counting.py + test_e2_counting.py + test_e2_benchmark.py + thresholds + committed corpus + README; git clone --local isolation, bucket-based classify_pair, class-4 template, self-check-isolation). ORIGIN/MAIN UPDATE absorbed: flaky enrich-prune test now SKIPPED on main (commit 207ac3c41, owned by bug 88eb = same root cause I diagnosed) -> CI friction gone, landing smooth; deduped my bfe1 -> 88eb (closed). No criteria change so attestations intact. E6 Exp-B running (~1/42).
